screens.name: ExpenseListScreen
screens.description: List of expenses with running total at top, filter chips for categories, each item shows amount/category/description/date with swipe-to-delete

screens.name: AddExpenseScreen
screens.description: Form with amount input, category dropdown, description text field, date picker

screens.name: ExpenseSummaryScreen
screens.description: Pie chart showing spending by category for selected month
